api.rateLimited: Too many requests — please slow down

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired — please sign in again
auth.sessionInvalid: Invalid session — please sign in again

forbidden.sessionOnly: This endpoint requires a browser session, not an API token

user.usernameInvalid: Username must start with a letter and contain only lowercase letters, digits, dot, underscore, or hyphen (2-32 characters)
user.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
user.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 256 characters

token.keyIdCollision: API token keyId collision (improbable; please retry)
token.nameInvalid: Token name must contain only letters, digits, dot, dash, underscore (1-64 chars)
token.fileMalformed: API tokens file at {{path}} is malformed
token.expiresAtInvalid: expiresAt must be a valid ISO date string
token.expiresAtPast: expiresAt must be in the future

changePassword.fieldsRequired: Current and new passwords are required

setup.fieldsRequired: Token, username, and password are required
setup.tokenInvalid: Setup token is invalid or has been used
setup.alreadyCompleted: Initial setup has already been completed

config.loadedPathUnknown: Configuration loader has no known on-disk path

upload.targetAndContentRequired: targetPath and content are required strings

apply.keepalivedValidateFailed: Keepalived validation rejected the rendered config: {{output}}

files.invalidName: File name must be a non-empty string

keepalived.stopConfirmRequired: Stop requires { "confirm": true } in body — VIPs held by this node will fail over to a peer (if one exists)
keepalived.pidUnreadable: Could not read keepalived pid from {{path}}
keepalived.startUnsupported: Direct strategy cannot restart keepalived from scratch — no supervisor configured. Set KEEPALIVED_CONTROL_STRATEGY to s6 or systemd, or start keepalived manually.

peer.tokenMissing: Bearer token required for peer endpoint
peer.outboundTokenRequired: Outbound token is required — paste a token from the peer's inbound-tokens list
peer.labelMustBeString: Label must be a string when provided

renewal.notLeader: Renewal skipped on node {{nodeId}}: this node is not the renewal leader. Configure renewalLeader: true in node.yaml or run renewal on the leader; renewed certs sync to peers automatically.

certbot.acmeCustomDirectoryUrlMissing: ACME account {{accountId}} has server "custom" but no directoryUrl
certbot.byoNotApplicable: BYO certificates do not use certbot

byo.nameInvalidChars: Name must contain only letters, digits, dot, dash, underscore
byo.privKeyMismatch: Private key does not match the leaf certificate
byo.leafNoSans: Leaf cert has no Subject Alternative Names — HAProxy needs SANs for SNI matching

trustedCa.idInvalid: Id must match a-z, 0-9, _, - (1-63 chars, letter-start)
trustedCa.noCaTrueCert: No certificate in the bundle has BasicConstraints CA:TRUE — this is unusual for a trusted CA file

trustedCrl.idInvalid: Id must match a-z, 0-9, _, - (1-63 chars, letter-start)
trustedCrl.noCrlBlock: No X509 CRL block found — expected -----BEGIN X509 CRL----- … -----END X509 CRL-----
trustedCrl.bodyNotBase64: CRL body is not valid base64

provider.idInvalid: Id must match a-z, 0-9, _, - (1-63 chars, letter-start)
provider.noCredentialsToManage: Provider type "{{type}}" has no credentials to manage

plugin.dirNotWhitelisted: dir is not in the configured whitelist
plugin.idInvalid: name must match a-z, 0-9, _, - (1-63 chars, letter-start)

stop.confirmRequired: Stopping HAProxy requires { "confirm": true } in the body — this will drop all proxied connections

server.invalidState: Server state must be one of: {{allowed}}
server.invalidWeight: Server weight must be an integer between 0 and 256

master.timeout: HAProxy master socket timed out after {{timeoutMs}}ms

stats.timeout: HAProxy stats socket timed out after {{timeoutMs}}ms

control.pidUnreadable: Could not read HAProxy pid from {{path}}
control.directStartUnavailable: Direct control strategy cannot start HAProxy — no supervisor configured. Set HAPROXY_CONTROL_STRATEGY to s6 or systemd, or start HAProxy manually.

map.keyValueRequired: Both key and value are required

maxconn.invalid: maxconn must be a non-negative integer

sessions.unavailable: HAProxy session data is currently unavailable

logs.supervisorTokenMissing: Supervisor token not available; the logs endpoint is only functional inside a Home Assistant addon

haNotify.tokenMissing: SUPERVISOR_TOKEN not set; HA notify channel only works inside a Home Assistant addon

geoip.noData: No GeoIP data for that IP

bulk.empty: body.ips must be a non-empty array
bulk.invalidEntry: Every IP must be a valid v4 or v6 string

download.sourceNone: Local DB source is set to "none"; nothing to download
download.maxmindKeyRequired: MaxMind license key required when localDbSource is "maxmind"
download.maxmindMissingMmdb: MaxMind tarball did not contain an .mmdb file
download.sourceUnavailable: Local DB source is "{{source}}"; no download available

cron.noFutureOccurrence: Cron expression has no future occurrences: {{expression}}

lock.acquireTimeout: Could not acquire lock at {{path}} within timeout
